pairs.question: What was the CMLL International Gran Prix (2008) and where did it take place?
pairs.answer: The CMLL International Gran Prix (2008) was a lucha libre, or professional wrestling, tournament produced by CMLL (Consejo Mundial de Lucha Libre). It took place on July 25, 2008, during the CMLL Super Viernes show at Arena México in Mexico City, Mexico, CMLL's main venue.

pairs.question: How many times had CMLL held the International Gran Prix tournament before 2008?
pairs.answer: The 2008 International Gran Prix was the eleventh time CMLL held the tournament since its inception in 1994.

pairs.question: What type of match format was used in the 2008 International Gran Prix tournament?
pairs.answer: The tournament featured a 16-man Torneo Cibernetico elimination match, where wrestlers competed in a multi-person elimination-style bout.

pairs.question: Who were the members of the Mexican team in the 2008 International Gran Prix?
pairs.answer: The Mexican team consisted of Averno, Dos Caras, Jr., Héctor Garza, Rey Bucanero, Shocker, Último Guerrero, Volador Jr., and Dr. Wagner, Jr.

pairs.question: Which wrestlers made up Team International in the 2008 International Gran Prix?
pairs.answer: Team International included Alex Koslov and Marco Corleone, who worked for CMLL, as well as six wrestlers from TNA (Total Nonstop Action Wrestling): A.J. Styles, Alex Shelley, Johnny Devine, Chris Sabin, Jay Lethal, and Sonjay Dutt.

pairs.question: Who won the 2008 International Gran Prix tournament, and how did they achieve it?
pairs.answer: Alex Shelley of Team International won the tournament by eliminating Último Guerrero as the last man standing in the Torneo Cibernetico elimination match.

pairs.question: What other significant wrestling event occurred on the same night as the 2008 International Gran Prix finals?
pairs.answer: On the same night, Místico defeated Perro Aguayo Jr. to win the finals of the Leyenda de Plata (Silver Legend) tournament.
